textByHashes.76d90084206ced36c6f92f0a0a8a53c4b4868cac: A great adventurer, from afar? How may I help with my repertoire?
textByHashes.41f5726ee18b4cc8ebee1c0def1f7622fbb3d83b: If it's Piscarilius information you seek, it's in my brain that you must peek!
textByHashes.166538e3f927fbeeb83b5ba8cec03aa9ba9f89d9: Within the Piscarilius house, you'll find, great fisherman, traders, pirates and I. All lead, by our ruthless leader, Shauna Piscarilius, none yet to supersede her.
textByHashes.fafc61ae8e0a6156a8d58984cf2ff3a25b1a76e6: No surprise if you meet her, her tactics are ruthless. Her demeanour renders, all pirates toothless.
textByHashes.db3b8ad3861ac5ee2e44997e193e21b629143656: Our great shore and trading, have treasures to be found, providing export and fish, in quantities abound.
textByHashes.aa83270c862463c8c8de4b120805b8f2969cdf6c: Repairing net cranes, and gathering bait, newcomers to the port, well this is their fate... It's labour intensive, and dirty work, though stick to it friend, 'till your arms are inert.
textByHashes.7d6176ac1c170e98c845e18c4935b3ef19e8d6ec: Our shore is brimming, with gold from the sea, the most loyal of our people, are handed the key. We'll let you stand on our shores and collect, the great anglerfish; other houses... covet?
textByHashes.782c3589d0ca4be49dcae8ae6000a6807c420768: Listen here pal, you don't mess with people in Piscarilius. Do you want happy rhyming Leenz, or angry, gruff and pain-inflicting Leenz?
textByHashes.0cd96e8e5dd3b95baa32cc8929693919b646611c: Anytime, my adventuring friend, enjoy your time in Great Kourend!
textByHashes.1f7e9d4677d7b61073f033d0ec6e607c4a44d36b: If there's one thing, that I do best, it's waiting patiently, for my guests!
textByHashes.e0c6cea997e950c43d9199d6543af9fea3d5b98b: Within Port Piscarilius, you'll find, great fisherman, traders, pirates and I. All lead, by our ruthless leader, Shauna Piscarilius, none yet to supersede her.
textByHashes.246ca641c46774945bc3b9788a02bab8c189f6c9: Our shore is brimming, with gold from the sea, the most loyal of our people, are handed the key. We'll let you stand on our shores and collect, the great anglerfish; other only... covet?
textByHashes.6b5d28c9aaadb0d24add99a947896620323d2c2f: Listen here pal, you don't mess with people in Port Piscarilius. Do you want happy rhyming Leenz, or angry, gruff and pain-inflicting Leenz?
